Video.summary: Tom awards $100K, a Disney trip, and counts down AFHV’s best musical montages and classic clips.
Video.title: Episode 1614

Video.summary: A harmless-looking dog - becomes a hell hound when bathed; and a bride's - bouquet shredded by a ceiling fan.
Video.title: Episode 203

Video.summary: Highlights include a birthday girl blowing out her - dentures; and a man's pants fall down in a chicken - coop.
Video.title: Episode 204

Video.summary: Grandma on a toy pool and falls flat on her back; and a woman falls off a lawn mower crashing into branches.
Video.title: Episode 205

Video.summary: Highlighting a cat riding a turtle; and a man's - parachute gets caught on a ship's mast, making him - dangle.
Video.title: Episode 206

Video.summary: A man cuts into a cake with a water balloon inside, and a man's pants fall down while walking down the aisle.
Video.title: Episode 207
